title: Agentic Engineering Operating Model
summary: A governed, platform-enabled, human-and-agent operating model for modernizing, delivering, operating, and continuously evolving enterprise software systems.
description: This model treats agentic engineering as an enterprise operating model rather than a coding accelerator.
It combines modernization methods, platform engineering, human oversight, and specialized agents across the full software lifecycle.
The same model can support strategy, delivery, enablement, managed operations, and commercial packaging.
